issues.detail: The skill only covers happy path scenarios and does not address error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes a Kubernetes environment with helm and kubectl, limiting its applicability to other platforms.

scenarios.name: provision-s3-with-versioning
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits the kubectl get managed command, while Response B lacks the required BucketVersioning resource, correct API version, providerConfigRef to default, and the kubectl get managed reference.

scenarios.name: create-database-abstraction
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers the trace command and claim, while Response A lacks the trace and XRD/Composition definitions.
